concept: Not every café is about coffee. Some are about slowing down. An analog, tactile, and warm digital space mimicking the physical feeling of a slow morning.

grid_patterns.gallery: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 md:gap-8 auto-rows-[300px]

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-3 rounded-full bg-[#C86F54] text-[#FDFBF7] font-sans font-medium transition-all hover:bg-[#B35A3F] hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-3 rounded-full border border-[#2C1E16] text-[#2C1E16] font-sans font-medium transition-all hover:bg-[#2C1E16] hover:text-[#FDFBF7] hover:-translate-y-0.5

navigation.wrapper: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80 border-b border-[#2C1E16]/10 transition-all duration-300
navigation.links: text-[#5C4A3D] hover:text-[#C86F54] font-sans font-medium transition-colors text-sm uppercase tracking-wider

menu_list.item: flex items-end justify-between border-b border-dashed border-[#2C1E16]/20 pb-3
menu_list.title: font-serif text-xl sm:text-2xl text-[#2C1E16]
menu_list.price: font-sans font-medium text-[#C86F54] text-lg sm:text-xl pl-4 whitespace-nowrap

offer_cards.wrapper: bg-[#F5F2EB] p-8 sm:p-10 rounded-3xl border border-[#2C1E16]/5 transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1
offer_cards.icon_wrapper: w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-[#FDFBF7] flex items-center justify-center text-[#C86F54] mb-6 shadow-sm

form.input: w-full bg-transparent border-b border-[#2C1E16]/30 px-0 py-3 font-sans text-[#2C1E16] placeholder:text-[#2C1E16]/40 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#C86F54] focus:ring-0 transition-colors rounded-none
form.select: w-full bg-transparent border-b border-[#2C1E16]/30 px-0 py-3 font-sans text-[#2C1E16] focus:outline-none focus:border-[#C86F54] focus:ring-0 transition-colors rounded-none appearance-none

motion.scroll_reveal: Use framer-motion. Initial: opacity-0, y-10. WhileInView: opacity-100, y-0. Transition: duration 0.8s, ease-out.
motion.stagger_children: Stagger list items (like menu items or gallery images) by 0.1s.

hero_background.description: Warm cinematic coffee cups and bagel on rustic wood. Use with a gradient overlay: from-black/40 to-black/10.

about_image.description: Cozy modern cafe interior with hanging lamps.

menu_highlight.description: Beautiful flatlay of soup, croissants, and lemonade. Use next to or behind a specific menu category.

gallery_images.description: Cozy window seat with wooden chairs

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all interactive elements and inputs have the `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='book-table-submit').
Use lucide-react for icons (Coffee, MapPin, Clock, Phone, Instagram, Facebook, Utensils).
Add 'html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }' to global css for anchored nav.

For the 'Book a Table' form, implement a functional React form that captures Name, Phone, Date, Time, Party Size, and Notes, preventing default submission and outputting the structured object via console.log.
Do NOT use standard Shadcn cards with thick borders for the Offer section. Use the custom 'offer_cards' styling provided above.
Do NOT use a standard table for the Menu. Use the 'menu_list' flex layout with dashed borders.
Implement the language switcher in the navbar to toggle the displayed text for Menu categories. It can just switch an active state in React and display the corresponding text object.
Include a 'href' anchor tag on the Nav items to correctly snap to sections (e.g., href='#about', href='#menu').
Embed Google Fonts exactly as provided in typography.google_fonts_url inside the index.html or global css.
